pi_items.source: Official Jitsi Meet handbook documentation at https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/ confirms 'M - Mute or unmute your microphone'
Official Jitsi Meet handbook documentation at https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/ confirms 'V - Start or stop your camera'
Official Jitsi Meet handbook documentation at https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/ confirms 'F - Show or hide video thumbnails'
This is a task design parameter (room name to join), not a claim about real data that can be independently verified
This is a task design parameter (display name to use), not a claim about real data that can be independently verified
These are task specification items describing files the agent should create, not verifiable metadata claims about external data

privileged_info_summary: The task uses official Jitsi Meet keyboard shortcuts: M for mute/unmute microphone, V for start/stop camera, and F for show/hide filmstrip (video thumbnails). These shortcuts come from the standard Jitsi Meet application and are documented in the official Jitsi handbook. The environment uses unmodified Jitsi Meet Docker containers (version stable-9753) with no custom keyboard shortcut configuration. The data source is the real, production Jitsi Meet software, not synthetic data.
